topic.title: Basic Video Editing Concepts for Beginners
topic.shortdesc: Master fundamental video editing concepts before you start creating.

section.title: Key Concepts
section.p: Clips: Individual video segments or photos you import into your project.
Timeline: The sequence where you arrange and edit all your clips.
Trim: Cutting out unwanted parts of a video clip.
Transitions: Effects that smoothly connect one clip to another.
Keyframe: A marker that defines the start or end of an animation or effect.
